title: MuslinZ Ex Large Muslin Cloths for Baby - Newborn Baby Essentials - Baby Swaddle -Bamboo Mix, Soft and Breathable (Laurel Leaf)
features: EXTRA LARGE MUSLIN SQUARE- 120cms x 120cms 70% Rayon from Bamboo - 30% Organic Cotton

MULTI-PURPOSE NEWBORN BABY ESSENTIAL - This large size muslin square can be so useful with a newborn and beyond. Use as a Receiving Blanket, Swaddle, Lightweight Moses Blanket or Sheet, Coverup when Feeeding, Cuddle Blanket, Towel, as so much more
QUALITY FABRIC - This MuslinZ range is made of 2ply muslin fabric 70% Bamboo for softness and 30% Organic Cotton for easy washing and drying. The Perfect combination.

UK BRAND - MuslinZ is a UK brand based in Oxfordshire UK. All our designs are unique to our brand. All our products are made to Oeko-Tex 100 Standard, ethically and in ISO and Oeko-Tex certified factories. MuslinZ is a brand you can trust to provide safe, good quality at affordable prices for your precious little one.
description: Product Description Our Classic Muslin Square MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: Machine Washable 40c - Wash before use. Made from 70% Bamboo / 30% Organic Cotton Luxuriously soft sensory swaddles with the qualities of Bamboo and the added strength of Organic Cotton MuslinZ sensory muslin swaddles can be used as burp cloth, general mopping up cloth and a baby comforter 120cm x 120cm sizing - Perfect for use as a cloth nappy for newborn babies, for shielding when breastfeeding, burping and mopping up cloth or as a lightweight baby blanket MuslinZ Laurel Leaf Bamboo Organic Muslin Swaddles Essential for all parents and their babies. In addition to swaddling and use as a blanket, the multi-functional sensory range can also be used as a stimulating visual aid. Use as playmat cover for tummy time, drape over a cot or pram side or hang in the baby's view. It will engage, entertain and help baby in their visual development and still be able to mop up that little dribble! Machine Washable 40c - Wash before use. Made from 70% Bamboo / 30% Organic Cotton Luxuriously soft sensory swaddles with the qualities of Bamboo and the added strength of Organic Cotton MuslinZ sensory muslin swaddles can be used as burp cloth, general mopping up cloth and a baby comforter 120cm x 120cm sizing - Perfect for use as a cloth nappy for newborn babies, for shielding when breastfeeding, burping and mopping up cloth or as a lightweight baby blanket MuslinZ Laurel Leaf Bamboo Organic Muslin Swaddle Our Bamboo Organic Muslin Swaddles can be used as newborn reusable cloth nappies, covers for breast feeding, burp cloths, changing mat covers, newborn swaddles and baby comforters Machine Washable at 40c – prewash on short 30c wash and dry naturally to prepare for use. Line dry or low tumble dry – avoid high temperatures and direct heat. With Bamboo loops and a cotton frame this is a perfect combination as part of a slim, soft and absorbent nappy system. Designed in the UK At MuslinZ we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality so we decided to design our own. Our muslin's are well known for good quality in the UK and worldwide.
